programs.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programs.desc: Susan takes a trip to the South Downs home of Winnie the Pooh, enjoying picture postcard scenery and a dose of childhood nostalgia, topped off with a trip to Hundred Acre Wood.

programs.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programs.desc: PC Martain Anderson pursues a BMW driving on cloned plates. What do the driver and passengers have to hide? In Newcastle, a cop tails a car doing 50mph in a 30.

programs.title: Police Interceptors
programs.desc: The Firearms Squad responds to reports of a machete gang trying to break into a house. And a rude suspected drink driver is caught pulling racetrack moves with a baby on the back seat.

programs.title: Number One Fan
programs.desc: Thriller with Sally Lindsay and Jill Halfpenny. TV star Lucy is saved from a mugging by 'number one fan' Donna, and taken into Lucy's inner circle - but Donna has an ulterior motive..

programs.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programs.desc: All roads policing officers are called to attend what might be a potentially fatal collision on the M5. And at the scene there's a truck on fire at the side of the carriageway.

programs.title: Traffic Cops
programs.desc: the driver fails to stop, before heading the wrong way down a dual carriageway. And the race is on to save a driver whose car careered into a swamp.
